title: GCP Cloud Storage bucket configuration
description: Per-bucket hardening posture captured read-only from the Cloud Storage JSON API buckets.list (roles/storage.bucketViewer, projection=noAcl): encryption (default CMEK key), public-access-prevention, uniform bucket-level access, object versioning, and retention-policy duration. Bucket CONFIGURATION only — never the contents of any stored object, never an ACL entry, never a signed-URL secret. The connector never touches the object data plane.

default_kms_key_name.description: Customer-managed encryption key (CMEK) resource name. Empty == Google-managed encryption key (still encrypted at rest).

uniform_access.description: Uniform bucket-level access is enabled (IAM-only, no legacy per-object ACLs).

public_access.description: public-access-prevention state: enforced (no public access possible), inherited (inherits org/project policy), or unspecified.

versioning_enabled.description: Object versioning is enabled on the bucket.

retention_seconds.description: Retention-policy duration in seconds. 0 == no retention policy configured.

reason.description: Human-readable reason when the hardening verdict is fail/inconclusive.
